title: PlanConfig
description: Per-plan configuration controlling Plandex's autonomy flags and executor behavior. Maps to the autonomy levels surfaced via CLI flags (--no-auto, --basic, --plus, --semi, --full).

autoApply.description: Automatically apply pending changes without prompting.

autoCommit.description: Commit applied changes to git automatically.

autoContinue.description: Continue a multi-step plan without manual confirmation between steps.

autoDebug.description: Automatically execute and debug failing commands.

autoDebugTries.description: Maximum debug iterations before giving up.

autoExec.description: Execute commands after successful apply without confirmation.

autoLoadContext.description: Use the project map to automatically load context.

skipChangesMenu.description: Skip the interactive changes menu when a response finishes.

smartContext.description: Load only the files needed for each step during implementation.
